# Zoro

> Privacy-first research agent that builds a personal knowledge graph on your machine.

Zoro searches the web, extracts entities and relationships using local LLMs (via Ollama), and stores everything in a local PostgreSQL + pgvector database. It exposes capabilities as an MCP server for tool-aware clients (Claude Code, Cursor) and as a standalone CLI.

## Key Concepts

- Knowledge Graph: entities and relationships extracted from web content, stored locally
- MCP Server: Model Context Protocol interface over stdio for AI assistant integration
- Deep Research: automated pipeline — web search via SearXNG, knowledge ingestion, LLM synthesis
- Multi-turn Chat: conversational agent with session persistence

## Links

- [Source](https://github.com/urmzd/zoro)
- [Releases](https://github.com/urmzd/zoro/releases)
- [Go Docs](https://pkg.go.dev/github.com/urmzd/zoro)
- [saige (core library)](https://github.com/urmzd/saige)
- [MCP Go SDK](https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/go-sdk)
